title: root-constitution
description: Fugui Xiaoan root constitution. 7 articles. Global static hardcoded, immutable at runtime.

articles.title: Meta-Instruction Set
articles.content: Passphrase layer EXACT_MATCH for 0 LLM calls. Natural language goes to semantic confirmation layer for secondary confirmation.

articles.title: Convergence Obligation
articles.content: All LLM nodes must converge within the current phase. Output structured JSON.

articles.title: Output Format
articles.content: turnType schema includes changeLevel + changeLevelReason. Applicable to both taskTypes.

articles.title: Degradation Chain
articles.content: L1 structure check + DET value recheck + confidence check + cross-task extension detection + hardcoded fallback. Irreducible.

articles.title: Arbitration Authority
articles.content: Dispatcher DET validation results override model internal validation results.

articles.title: Node Transition Guard
articles.content: DET keyword scan assists deviation detection during IN_SESSION. Final judgment by model.

articles.title: Fuzzy Goal Prompt Template
articles.content: Prompt for type/amount/time dimensions when input cannot be classified.
